attestation.statement: Clinician confirmed in writing having clinically reviewed all 51 answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation)

transform_flags: case_id SEQ provisional (00033, derived from source AUC-033) — maintainer to confirm/reassign within the SPEC-GI-01 bucket; this case (NSAID-related upper GI bleed in a nursing home resident) is distinct from the already-completed 'Acute Gastrointestinal Bleeding AUC-007'.

Informant for this history is facility nursing staff rather than the patient directly; disclosure_gate values set to standard schema enum values as no dedicated third-party/facility-staff gate exists.

Source note describes in-person Trendelenburg positioning, NSAID cessation, and 000 ICP dispatch already having occurred; presentation layer models the case at the point of initial telehealth contact per protocol reprojection rules.
Vitals and rectal examination findings were clinician-observed and sealed into 10/11 rather than placed in patient-reportable content.

A minor schema drift note: 'documentation_for_gp' field duplicated conceptually as 'documentation_for_gp/facility' key was included alongside the required 'documentation_for_gp' key in baseline_safety_net_advice; maintainer should confirm additionalProperties handling for this object if strict mode is later enforced.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
